title: Cloud Computing
description: Model for on-demand network access to a shared pool of configurable IT resources (e.g., networks, servers, storage, applications, and services) that can be rapidly provisioned and released with min...

definitions.definition: Model for on-demand network access to a shared pool of configurable IT resources (e.g., networks, servers, storage, applications, and services) that can be rapidly provisioned and released with minimal management effort or service provider interaction.
definitions.sources:
- [NIST SP 800-145, The NIST Definition of Cloud Computing](https://nvlpubs.nist.gov/nistpubs/Legacy/SP/nistspecialpublication800-145.pdf) ; NOAA Cloud Computing Lexicon and Related Terms
- NESDIS Data Management Lexicon and Related Terms
